title: adelia phillyreoides
intro: Adelia phillyreoides, also known as Phyllanthus niruri, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, often found in swampy areas and along rivers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Adelia phillyreoides include its ability to treat kidney stones, gallstones, and liver disease, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
